name: Rakott Krumpli (Hungarian Layered Casserole)
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard-boil the eggs; peel and slice.
2. Drop potatoes in their skins into water to cover with 1 tablespoon salt. Cook until fork tender; slice.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Butter a deep casserole dish, and arrange a layer of potatoes on the bottom, seasoning with salt.
5. Melt butter and sprinkle a little over the potatoes. Cover with ham strips, repeat the potato, salt, and butter layers.
6. Arrange egg slices, then sausage slices on top, finishing with a potato layer.
7. Pour remaining butter over and spread sour cream on top.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes. If refrigerated before cooking, lengthen cooking time to one hour.
